name: Jake the Dewott
description:
A few people have been requesting a bot of myself so I decided to try my hand at it, It's been a heck of a trial trying to nail down all of the unique traits that I have to summarize into one bot, results may vary.
All I can say is I tried, the rest is up to your experience, enjoy!

Art by Nsane99
creator: Hedghog2234
